seoTitle: Coominglah Forest vs Coomoo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coominglah Forest and Coomoo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Coominglah Forest vs Coomoo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coominglah Forest and Coomoo.
heading: Coominglah Forest vs Coomoo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coominglah Forest, Queensland and Coomoo, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coomoo has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Coominglah Forest (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coominglah Forest or Coomoo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coominglah Forest has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Coomoo scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coominglah Forest scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Coomoo scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coominglah Forest or Coomoo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coomoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
